items.title: Role Creation with Entity and Permission Assignment
items.description: Admins can create roles with name, entity assignments, and privilege configurations in a single unified editor. Role data persists correctly across login sessions with no data loss.

items.title: Role Creation Performance
items.description: Role creation and save operations complete within acceptable performance thresholds with no noticeable UI delay.

items.title: Duplicate Role Name Validation
items.description: System prevents creation of duplicate role names within the same tenant. Validation is case-insensitive. Same role names are allowed across different tenants.

items.title: Permission Check Performance
items.description: Permission validation executes within defined SLA (<100ms). System handles concurrent permission checks under load without degradation or timeouts.

items.title: Permission Enforcement Without Leakage
items.description: Permissions are enforced accurately after role modifications. No cached stale permissions remain. Changes apply immediately without manual cache clearing.

items.title: Role Cloning
items.description: Admins can clone existing roles including all entities and privileges. Cloned roles are independent - modifications to clones do not affect originals.

items.title: Hierarchical Entity Selection
items.description: Entity tree supports parent-child selection behavior. Selecting parent auto-selects all children. Deselecting parent deselects all children. Partial child selection shows indeterminate parent state.

items.title: Dynamic Privilege Filtering by Entity
items.description: Privilege list filters dynamically based on selected entities. Only relevant privileges are visible. Privileges update in real-time when entity selection changes.

items.title: Privilege Category Organization
items.description: Privileges should be grouped logically in categories with clear labeling and no duplicates across categories. Currently failing - categories are not organizing privileges clearly.

items.title: Invalid Privilege-Entity Combination Prevention
items.description: System blocks save when invalid privilege-entity combinations exist. Previously selected privileges are removed or validated when entity selection changes.

items.title: Privilege Selection Performance
items.description: Multiple privilege selections complete smoothly without lag. Rapid entity switching updates privilege list correctly without JS errors or state corruption.

items.title: Concurrent Role Operations
items.description: System handles concurrent admin operations without data corruption, race conditions, or version conflicts. Proper optimistic locking enforced.

items.title: Tenant Isolation for Roles and Privileges
items.description: Roles and privileges are strictly isolated per tenant. No cross-tenant visibility or privilege leakage.

items.title: Role Assignment from User Profile
items.description: Admins can assign roles to users from user profile. Assignment completes within 5 seconds. Assigned roles grant correct permissions immediately.

items.title: Bulk Role Assignment to Groups
items.description: Admins can assign roles to groups. All group members receive the role. Bulk assignment completes within 5 seconds for groups of 50+ users.

items.title: Effective Permissions View
items.description: Admins can view user's effective permissions showing direct roles, group roles, and merged permissions. Loads within 10 seconds. Correct merge logic and conflict handling.

items.title: Role Removal from Groups
items.description: Removing role from group immediately revokes access from all members. Effective permissions update dynamically.

items.title: Multi-Group Role Deduplication
items.description: Users belonging to multiple groups with same role receive no duplicate assignment. Clean permission calculation.

items.title: Effective Permissions Performance Under Large Dataset
items.description: Effective permissions calculation completes within 10 seconds even for users with 10+ groups and 20+ roles.

items.title: Entity-Specific Permission Overrides
items.description: Admins can add deny or grant overrides for specific privileges on specific entities. Overrides are displayed in a clear table format and can be added or removed immediately.

items.title: Deny Override Precedence
items.description: Deny overrides should take precedence over global grants. Currently failing - deny on Entity A should block edit while allowing edit on Entity B.

items.title: Override Validation and Performance
items.description: System prevents duplicate overrides. Override on deleted/invalid entity shows validation error. Large override sets (50+) load without performance degradation.

items.title: Exclude Privilege from Individual User
items.description: Admins can exclude specific privileges from individual users without creating new roles. Other users in same role are unaffected. Exclusions work independently.

items.title: Restriction Performance and Persistence
items.description: Restrictions apply within ~20 seconds. Restoration completes within ~10 seconds. Restrictions persist across logout/login cycles.

items.title: Restriction Audit Logging
items.description: Audit logs capture restriction events with admin name, timestamp, affected user, excluded privilege, and reason.

items.title: Restricted User Clear Messaging
items.description: Restricted users receive clear messages explaining restrictions with contact/reference info, not generic 'Access Denied' errors.

items.title: Invalid Exclusion Prevention
items.description: System prevents excluding privileges the user doesn't have via their assigned roles.
